violations.text: A container of Pasta was observed held at 44 to 50 degrees Fahrenheit in the cookline Sautee Prep Cooler. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per the PIC, the potatoes were in the cooler since previous day. Potatoes were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Spray bottle(s) of sanitizer were observed hanging by the sprayer nozzle at the bar alcohol trays. Chemicals must be stored in a manner to prevent the possible contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Spray bottles were rearranged for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Clam shells used for stuffies (not cleaned yet) were observed outside on the on the pavement next to the lower area walk-in cooler. Clam shells intended to be used as a food contact surface are to be stored in a way to prevent possible contamination from various sources. Clam shells were moved to a protected location at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Sauces were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Sauces and other items previously cooked and set for cooling are to be placed in shallow pans for rapid cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Lobster was observed to be thawing in the walk-in cooler in its intact packaging. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. Lobster packaging was cut open at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets to the cold drawers on the cookline were observed in poor repair (detached). Per the PIC, new gaskets are on order for replacement. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

At the time of inspection, the bar/server sinks were observed to be lacking a proper air gap (Currently equipped with an air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
